article.title: Seth Troxler: A Distinctive Voice in Techno
article.subtitle: Detroit roots and Berlin relocation define a rising talent.
article.author: A. Stern
article.excerpt: Seth Troxler's distinctive techno sound is shaped by his Detroit roots and recent relocation to Berlin, with releases on respected labels cementing his presence in the European scene.

content.text: Seth Troxler has quickly established himself as a distinctive voice in the techno scene. Despite his young age, his achievements are notable and his sound is unmistakably influenced by his Detroit roots.

His recent relocation to Berlin has further solidified his position within the European techno elite. Troxler's work is characterized by a distinctive style that draws from a range of unconventional influences.
Troxler's releases on respected labels such as Spectral, Wagon Repair, and M_NUS have garnered attention and praise. These works showcase his evolving approach to techno production and performance.
Recent releases including This Is Then, DJ-Kicks (Seth Troxler) [DJ Mix], and Mixmag Presents Seth Troxler: The Illusion Nouveau (DJ Mix) demonstrate his continued growth and influence in the genre.
